encounters.hazard: Ticking clock-floor that shifts every 10 seconds

pickup.name: Chronosand Vial
pickup.effect: Allows short-term stasis of metallic objects

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry releases the energy needed to access the Control Room

encounters.hazard: Flickering temporal rifts that drain health

pickup.name: Master Gear Component
pickup.effect: Essential for shutting down the Boss's shielding

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the component aligns the bridge to the Boss Arena

boss.name: Iron-Clad Timekeeper
boss.victory_condition: Overload the central core while the shielding is down

normalized.objective: Restore the temporal anchor to stabilize the city's crumbling core

output.objective: Deactivate the Aether-Core pulse generator before it shatters the crust of the city.

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of surroundings

encounters.trigger: Destroying the automaton shorts out the gate lock leading to the Boiler Room.

pickup.name: Crystallized Aether Shard
pickup.effect: Stabilizes unstable geomantic energy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wraith releases the safety seal on the Core Chamber elevator.

pickup.name: Void-Iron Key
pickup.effect: Opens the main Aether-Core housing

encounters.trigger: The Golem's demise triggers a resonance frequency that opens the Boss arena.

boss.name: Clockwork Titan of Entropy
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Void-Iron Key into the heart of the Titan to overload its mechanism.

output.reward: The Geomancer's Sigil of Earth Control
output.setting: The subterranean levels of the floating city of Aethelgard

normalized.setting: The subterranean levels of the floating city of Aethelgard

output.objective: Restore the flow of steam to the Clockwork Arboretum by purifying the malfunctioning vents.

enemy.name: Rust-Coated Gear-Sprite
enemy.weakness: The heavy blunt force of the Gilded Steam-Censer

encounters.hazard: Slippery oil patches on the floor

pickup.name: Bottle of Polishing Oil
pickup.effect: Used to clean rust from machinery

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite clears the obstruction from the main steam pipe, revealing a path to the inner garden.

pickup.name: Conductive Copper Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central energy conduit

encounters.trigger: Disabling the sentinel unlocks the service lift, granting access to the upper canopy level.

encounters.hazard: Rotating cogs that slowly push the player back

pickup.name: High-Pressure Valve Handle
pickup.effect: Necessary for neutralizing the Boss's shielding

encounters.trigger: Defeating this enemy activates the control console, opening the way to the final chamber.

boss.name: Grand Clockwork Gardener
boss.victory_condition: Neutralize the Gardener's defensive shielding using the High-Pressure Valve Handle and strike the core.

output.reward: The Chrono-Paladin's Amulet of Eternal Calm
